name: Academic Paper
description: Traditional academic formatting with proper hierarchy and citations.

preview.sampleText: Traditional academic formatting with proper hierarchy and citations style.

classes.h2: text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 border-b border-gray-300 pb-2
